name: Karnail Singh Paras
description: '''Karnail Singh Paras''' (28 June 1916 – 28 February 2009) was an Indian [[Kavishar]] from Punjab, India. He is the father of former union minister and [[Samajwadi Party]] politician [[Balwant Singh Ramoowalia]] and Canada based writer Iqbal Singh Ramoowalia. One of his granddaughters is married to singer and actor [[Harbhajan Maan]].
